title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is an open-source AI model designed for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates its capabilities on ComfyUI, compares it to SeedVR2, and shows workflows for text-to-image and upscaling tasks.
